name: Convai
description: Conversational AI platform for voice-enabled 3D characters in games and virtual worlds with Unity and Unreal integrations.

seo.title: Convai — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Convai: Conversational AI platform for voice-enabled 3D characters in games and virtual worlds with Unity and Unreal integrations.

when_to_use: Adding conversational AI NPCs to games and virtual worlds
Building persistent AI characters with long-term memory
Powering AI companions in metaverse or XR experiences

cons: Latency strict budget for real-time games
Voice quality behind ElevenLabs in isolation
review.verdict: The default for voice-enabled NPCs in Unity/Unreal; not meant for non-game use cases.
review.best_for: Game studios and VR developers adding conversational NPCs
review.not_for: Non-game voice apps — ElevenLabs or Vapi fit better
